creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Mirror Leaseweb from comment #2)


Done.

$ host ftp2.nl.freebsd.org
ftp2.nl.freebsd.org is an alias for mirror.nl.leaseweb.net.
mirror.nl.leaseweb.net is an alias for mirror.ams1.nl.leaseweb.net.
mirror.ams1.nl.leaseweb.net has address 5.79.108.33
mirror.ams1.nl.leaseweb.net has IPv6 address 2001:1af8:4700:b210::33

And thank you for providing this mirror.


---

As we are here, let me inquire about another thing.

We don't have a mirror managed by the project in the Netherlands anymore to make available the other services like pkg.freebsd.org, git.freebsd.org, www.freebsd.org, docs.freebsd.org, etc.
If you have interest/resources for that, please let us know.
More details here: https://wiki.freebsd.org/Teams/clusteradm/tiny-mirror

And we can list the sponsorship at:
https://freebsdfoundation.org/our-donors/donors/ (In Kind Donations)
https://www.freebsd.org/internal/about/


Regards.







Regards.
